## Source: ghsa-malware (7c938fbe5a2fdf659a50d89260f2f88e6c5c24b80b0bf6bd9de8a91002d3af6c)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2350ce89ed9fa54fd9b4769812f9fd66b03f8d0252fb066f4e001e24e86cdad1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-kredz-core' @ 1.0.3 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
